channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Yacht Club Games' 'Mina The Hollower' Soundtrack to Be Released on Vinyl
item.description: The soundtrack for Yacht Club Games' action-adventure title 'Mina The Hollower' is set to be released on vinyl for the first time, marking a significant milestone for fans of the game. Developed by th...

item.title: Importance of early childhood communication

item.title: Davido says his music encourages people to believe in themselves and embrace their own journey
item.description: Afrobeats superstar Davido has shared why he believes his music goes beyond entertainment, saying one of the greatest rewards of his career is knowing that his songs inspire confidence in people who s...

item.title: Pendlebury defends Quaynor after Crows fans' boos in AFL clash
item.description: Collingwood champion Scott Pendlebury has addressed the backlash faced by teammate Isaac Quaynor after being jeered by Adelaide Oval fans during a crucial AFL match. Quaynor, playing his 150th game, e...

item.title: Tips for Achieving Crispy Fries at Home Like Takeout
item.description: The article provides a detailed guide on replicating restaurant-quality crispy fries at home using simple techniques. Key steps include selecting starchy potatoes such as russets, soaking cut strips i...

item.title: Blake Austin reflects on Wests Tigers' decline after condemning fan behaviour at Leichhardt Oval
item.description: Former NRL player Blake Austin has revisited comments he made earlier in the season after the Wests Tigers' form dramatically declined following their victory over the Canberra Raiders at Leichhardt O...

item.title: SWS Survey Shows Majority Support for Sara Duterte to Address Impeachment Charges
item.description: A recent Social Weather Survey (SWS) conducted from June 20 to 29, 2026, revealed that 70% of Filipinos believe Vice President Sara Duterte must address the impeachment charges filed against her. This...

item.title: Hamilton police arrest 16-year-old suspect linked to stolen vehicle via McDonald's receipt
item.description: Hamilton police arrested a 16-year-old suspect in connection with a stolen vehicle investigation after discovering a McDonald's receipt in the abandoned car. The vehicle, a black Ford Explorer, was fo...

item.title: Innovative Startup Revolutionizes Dairy Sector with Tech-Driven Solutions
item.description: A startup backed by e crore investment has emerged as a game-changer in India's dairy industry, led by two young entrepreneurs who leveraged technology to modernize traditional cattle farming practice...

item.title: Pulp's New Film 'What Do You Do For An Encore' to Premiere in Cinemas
item.description: Pulp's new film, 'What Do You Do For An Encore', has been confirmed for a one-night-only cinema release. Directed by Garth Jennings, the 90-minute movie features narration from Jarvis Cocker and chron...

item.title: Zanzibar Introduces Electric Buses for Public Transport
item.description: On July 23, 2026, President Dr. Mwinyi officially launched a fleet of electric buses in Zanzibar to modernize public transport. This initiative aims to reduce carbon emissions, lower operational costs...

item.title: Red Sea attacks spark global oil price surge and geopolitical tensions
item.description: Oil prices have surged to $US100 per barrel following attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, escalating tensions in the region. The Houthis, an Iran-aligned group, claimed responsibility for tar...

item.title: South Africa's Reserve Bank Maintains Interest Rates Amid Uncertain Outlook
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank's Monetary Policy Committee has decided to keep interest rates unchanged, leaving the repo rate at 7% and the prime lending rate at 10.50%. This decision came despite ex...

item.title: Barbie Imperial’s Performance as Jamilah Abubakar Highlights the Emotional Depth of “Blood vs Duty”
item.description: The article highlights Barbie Imperial’s portrayal of Jamilah Abubakar in the television series “Blood vs Duty,” recognising the role as one of her strongest and most emotionally compelling performanc...

item.description: Former Alliance for Democracy (AD) governorship candidate in Lagos State, Owolabi Salis, recently held strategic meetings with former Vice-President Atiku Abubakar to discuss Nigeria's democratic deve...

item.title: Cross-Generational Voices Advocate for Nuclear Disarmament and Peace

item.title: St. Thomas Man Faces Kidnapping and Sexual Assault Charges in London
item.description: A man from St. Thomas, Ontario, has been charged with kidnapping and sexual assault following an investigation into alleged crimes in London. The case, reported by CTV News, highlights the serious nat...

item.title: Karachi Police Kill Suspect in Six-Year-Old Girl's Murder Case After Shootout
item.description: Karachi police killed a suspect accused of abducting and murdering a six-year-old girl during a shootout after he opened fire on officers during a raid in the Keamari area. The police spokesperson con...

item.title: Pendlebury and McRae criticise Adelaide crowd after Isaac Quaynor booed throughout Collingwood's win
item.description: Collingwood veteran Scott Pendlebury has criticised sections of the Adelaide Oval crowd after defender Isaac Quaynor was repeatedly booed during the Magpies' 34-point comeback victory over Adelaide. P...

item.title: Alejandro Garnacho Loans To Villa After Poor Chelsea Spell
item.description: Alejandro Garnacho, 22, has completed a season-long loan move to Aston Villa from Chelsea after a challenging first season in England. The winger, who joined Chelsea from Manchester United in 2025, sc...
